band_rationale: Anti-circularity case (#53a): the true quality is LOW-medium — five real defects — but the engine currently sees only one, scoring 88. Floor 55 is the external judgment of where the score belongs once the known misses are caught (catching all four adds ~20 penalty -> 68), so closing those gaps PASSES the gate; ceiling 92 requires the one currently-caught defect to keep costing at least 8 points. Engine output at labeling time: 88.
note: Paraphrase case: the same defect classes as ambiguous/nfr-unquantified/impl-leak, worded to avoid the catalog's trigger regexes. Lint SHOULD ideally catch: 'snappy'/'lightweight'/'smoothly' (ambiguous wording, FR-001/FR-002); 'keep working when the whole company checks it at the same moment' (unquantified load NFR, FR-002); 'could later grow a spreadsheet export' (speculative feature, FR-003); 'CockroachDB'/'Svelte' (impl-detail leak, FR-004). Only the digit-based structural check (non-measurable success) generalizes to this phrasing today. These are labeled known_misses: excluded from gated recall, reported in recall_incl_known_misses so the miss stays visible.
